title: Vegetarian Malaysian Pulled Pork Bake
description: A twist on traditional pulled pork, this vegetarian version uses a flavorful Malaysian-inspired glaze to add depth and richness. Serve with your favorite sides for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add the garlicky mushroom and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pulled oats to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Malaysian curry paste, lacto-fermented soy sauce, vegetarian Worcestershire sauce, and bake-basic spices.
Add the curry paste mixture to the skillet and stir to combine. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as steamed vegetables or a side salad.
